rationale: Precise 8h funding rates, open interest, and 30-day correlation coefficients for UNI require authenticated API access or paid tiers on Coinglass, CoinGecko Pro, or Kaiko — none of these specific computed metrics are exposed on freely browsable public pages without login or API key as of mid-2025.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/uni — funding rate & OI overview page exists but real-time numeric values require account/API: NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER
https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/uniswap — price history available but correlation computation not pre-calculated: NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER
https://alternative.me/crypto/fear-and-greed-index/ — market-wide sentiment only, no per-asset correlation: NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER
https://fred.stlouisfed.org/ — NASDAQ index data available but cross-asset correlation vs UNI not pre-computed: NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER

notes.funding_rate_8h: Coinglass shows UNI perpetual funding on its public page (https://www.coinglass.com/uni) but the numeric value is behind a login wall or rendered dynamically and not scrapable as a free static fact.
notes.open_interest_usd: Same Coinglass limitation; aggregate OI across exchanges requires API key (https://docs.coinglass.com/).
notes.btc_correlation_30d: CoinGecko free REST API (/coins/uniswap/market_chart) provides OHLCV but does NOT return pre-computed correlation coefficients; manual calculation from raw data would be needed and is outside a single API call.
notes.eth_correlation_30d: Same as BTC correlation — raw data retrievable but coefficient not served by any free endpoint.
notes.nasdaq_correlation_30d: FRED provides NASDAQ Composite (NASDAQCOM) daily data free (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/NASDAQCOM), but cross-correlation with UNI price is not pre-computed anywhere on a free public page.
